title: Craftable Tridents Mod
description: Tridents are now craftable, with the right materials.
body:
This simple but essential datapack allows you to craft the Trident using resources found on your ocean adventures. No more grinding for hours hoping for a rare drop! The recipe is designed to be balanced, requiring you to conquer an Ocean Monument and find buried treasure, making it a rewarding late-game craft rather than an easy shortcut.

Features:

- Adds a crafting recipe for the Trident.
  
- Balanced for vanilla survival gameplay.
  
- Lightweight and server-friendly.
  
- Removes the frustrating RNG of Drowned farming.

![trident](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a1c2b9b970be04482d24cceef9fb9d7063021020.png)
